meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage user onboarding to validate ideas and solve the no-project-idea dilemma. A beginner guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' trap is actually a validation failure. By building a high-friction user onboarding flow first, you force users to define your product's value. Use Antigravity to scaffold the logic and Claude Code to iterate. If users won't complete your onboarding, they won't pay for your solution.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. You have the technical stack, the subscription to the latest models, and the drive to ship—but you have no product idea worth building. The graveyard of abandoned SaaS projects is filled with founders who built solutions for problems that didn't exist.

The secret isn't a better brainstorming technique; it's a better feedback loop. By prioritizing user onboarding over core features, you create a 'Validation Funnel.' You aren't building a product yet; you are building an interrogation tool that captures intent. When you focus on onboarding, you stop guessing what users need and start watching what they actually demand.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Map out the minimal steps required for a user to express their pain point. We focus on 'Zero-Day Value' where the user gets a result before they even finish signing up.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a user onboarding flow that captures three specific pain points from a founder persona, prioritizing brevity and high-conversion UI elements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Initialize project structure for a Next.js onboarding funnel with Tailwind CSS'.

steps.title: Implement the 'Magic Moment' Trigger
steps.description: Identify the exact moment your user realizes they have a project idea. This is your core conversion metric.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component that triggers a personalized AI insight based on user input during the onboarding process.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file components/OnboardingMagic.tsx --context 'Ensure AI integration uses the current user input state'.

steps.title: Data-Driven Friction Analysis
steps.description: If users drop off, it's not a bug; it's a signal. Use tracking to identify where your onboarding is failing to convince.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function for telemetry tracking that logs user progress through the onboarding steps to a JSON file.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add PostHog or segment tracking to the onboarding state transition logic'.

steps.title: Iterative Prompt Engineering for Onboarding
steps.description: Refine the AI prompts that greet users. The goal is to make the user feel like the product is reading their mind.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a system prompt for an AI agent that takes user input and returns a structured list of three high-potential SaaS project ideas.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file lib/ai-prompts.ts --instruction 'Update the system prompt to be more business-centric and focused on revenue potential'.

steps.title: Ship to Beta for Validation
steps.description: Don't polish the dashboard. Ship the onboarding flow to a landing page to see if people actually care.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft an automated deployment script that pushes the current onboarding flow to Vercel for immediate public feedback.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Configure Vercel deployment and output the preview URL for testing'.

pro_tips: Never ask for an email until the user has received their first 'Aha!' moment from your AI agent.
Use 'progressive disclosure' in your onboarding—only show complex options if the user demonstrates advanced intent.
Track 'Time to First Insight' as your primary North Star metric; if it takes more than 60 seconds, you have already lost them.
Pre-fill onboarding forms with AI-generated suggestions to reduce cognitive load and increase completion rates.
Treat your onboarding copy as a sales letter; every screen should address a specific objection or doubt.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a simple landing page, share it in niche communities like IndieHackers or Reddit, and iterate based on the drop-off data.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing what the market wants. Build the onboarding flow that reveals the truth about your product's potential today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
